     AI tuning, QoL) must be opt-in and additive — never a substitute for
     faithfully reproducing the original. If this is really "NovaSwift
     doesn't match the original yet," use the Fidelity mismatch template
     instead. -->

## Is this a faithful-port gap or a modern enhancement?

- [ ] **Faithful-port gap** — the original game does this and NovaSwift doesn't yet
- [ ] **Modern enhancement** — new capability beyond the original, should default OFF
